# CWE-283 — Unverified Ownership (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-283-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// Vulnerable: deletes user file without confirming the inode owner matches caller.
func DeleteUserFile(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodDelete {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	path := r.URL.Query().Get("path")
	if path == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing path", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	_ = os.Remove(path)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"removed":true}`))
}
